nx.doc: Number of cells along the x-axis (always required).

ny.doc: Number of cells along the y-axis (required for 2D and 3D grids; omit for 1D).

nz.doc: Number of cells along the z-axis (required only for 3D grids).

extent.doc: Axis-aligned bounding box. Either a 2xN matrix ([[lo...],[hi...]]) or a length-N vector of (lo, hi) pairs, where N is the grid's dimensionality (1, 2, or 3). Required when constructing a uniform grid.

edges.doc: Per-axis explicit edge coordinates for non-uniform grids. A length-N vector of strictly increasing edge arrays; axis i has length n_i + 1. When provided, supersedes nx/ny/nz/extent.

dtype.doc: Element precision: 'float64' or 'float32'. Cross-binding conformance is only promised at float64.
